zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Heywood於1558年出生在英國德比夏爾達爾波利時，她的父親William Heywood35歲，母親Alice29歲。她於1570年與William Fowler在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1617年12月2日在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾達爾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Heywood于1558年出生在英国德比夏爾達爾波利时，她的父亲William Heywood35岁，母亲Alice29岁。她于1570年与William Fowler在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1617年12月2日在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾達爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: Heywood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Heywood was born in 1558, in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England, her father, William Heywood, was 35 and her mother, Alice, was 29. She married William Fowler in 1570, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 December 1617, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Heywood est née en 1558, à Dalbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William Heywood, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Fowler en 1570, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 décembre 1617, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Dalbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Heywood 1558 in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Heywood 35 und ihre Mutter Alice 29. Sie hat 1570 in England William Fowler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Dezember 1617 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato William Fowler nel 1570, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 dicembre 1617, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Dalbury, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Heywoodが1558年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアダルブリーで生まれた時，父William Heywoodは35歳，母Aliceは29歳であった。1570年にイギリスでWilliam Fowlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1617年12月2日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアダルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Heywood(이)가 1558년 영국 더비실르 다버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Heywood(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1570년 영국에서 William Fowler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1617년 12월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 다버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Heywood nasceu em 1558, em Dalbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heywood, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fowler em 1570, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Heywood родилась в 1558 г. в местности далбури, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Heywood было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fowler в 1570 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 декабря 1617 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности далбури, дирбишир, Англия.
